ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data pipeline monitoring and observability systems, including lineage tracking, data freshness alerting, volume anomaly detection, schema drift detection, execution monitoring, cost attribution, and root-cause analysis tooling for pipeline failures and data quality incidents.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-S-005 (DA, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4197 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.420, nist_ai_rmf=0.417, nice=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DA domain KSA DA-S-005 excluded at composite 0.4197, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4197 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4197 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DA (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Market Research Analyst. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DA KSA with composite 0.4197 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-S-005 (DA, composite 0.4197) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4197 with signal across eu_ai_act=0.420, nist_ai_rmf=0.417, nice=0.397 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DA-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4197, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
